goal: Demonstrate selected tenant-isolation claim escalation from fast-lane report-only evidence to strict high-risk assurance blocking behavior.
scope: Synthetic scenario fixture only; no production tenant-isolation, authorization, database, or runtime-control behavior is changed.

assumptions.text: Tenant isolation is the selected high-risk domain for this fixture.
Normal fast-lane PRs keep the same gaps report-only unless risk:high, enforce-assurance, or critical-core policy selects enforcement.

rollbackPlan: Revert the fixture, generator, docs, and tests added for the high-risk escalation scenario.
requiredHumanInput: Reviewer disposition for missing adversarial/property and runtime-control evidence on the selected tenant-isolation claim.
Reviewer decision to reject or complete the waiver metadata before strict assurance can pass.
notes: This plan artifact is an expected fixture for the high-risk policy summary, not a live PR plan artifact.
